_comment_pathway: Pathway A (PDF Section 1) - Weather agent is packaged with google-adk and deployed to Vertex AI Reasoning Engine, so it is registered with adkAgentDefinition referencing the reasoningEngines resource path.
_comment_register_cmd: curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: Bearer $(gcloud auth print-access-token)' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @weather_agent.adkAgentDefinition.json 'https://discoveryengine.googleapis.com/v1alpha/projects/gemini-enterprise-app-499621/locations/global/collections/default_collection/engines/gemini-enterprise-app/assistants/default_assistant/agents'
_comment_patch_cmd: IMPORTANT: never DELETE+re-create to update (PDF: 30-day soft-delete cache locks authorizationId). Always PATCH: curl -X PATCH '.../agents/weather_agent_a2ui?updateMask=adkAgentDefinition' -d @...
name: projects/gemini-enterprise-app-499621/locations/global/collections/default_collection/engines/gemini-enterprise-app/assistants/default_assistant/agents/weather_agent_a2ui
description: ADK weather agent that returns current weather for any location via the get_weather tool.
